title: Extreme Weather Shelters * Homeless Families - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Extreme Weather Shelters * Homeless Families 5 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Homeless Couples Homeless Families Homeless Youth Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SEVERE WEATHER DESCHUTES COUNTY LA PINE WARMING SHELTER BY THE DOOR AT LA PINE OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. 16430 3rd Street La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with children. Well behaved pets are welcome; pets must remain with owner. Hours: 7 days per week 5pm-7am, Monday, December 1, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 -Meals served from 6pm-7pm Email (541) 948-6649 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER DESCHUTES COUNTY REDMOND WINTER SHELTER BY SHEPHERD'S HOUSE MINISTRIES OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. A meal is served each night. To-go bags are given out each morning. 1350 South Highway 97 Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older, families with minor children, and well behaved pets Hours: 7 days per week 6pm-7am Email (541) 388-2096 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LINN COUNTY SWEET HOME POLICE DEPARTMENT OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter when temperatures are extremely cold. 1950 Main Street Sweet Home, OR 97386 Hours: Open 24 hours per day / 7 days per week when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below Email (541) 967-3950 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LINN COUNTY THE RIVER CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter temperatures reach 32 degrees or below. Snacks will be available. 3000 S Santiam Highway Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Age 18 and older and families with minor children. Pets allowed. Hours: Open 7 days per week when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below 7pm-7am Shelter will close at 10pm if there are zero participants (541) 451-1271 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER UNION COUNTY RIGHT TRACK RESOURCE CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. Hot meals, grab and go meals and snacks, and shower/laundry access will be provided. There is no co-ed sleeping. 501 3rd Street La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with minor children. Pets allowed but must be crated or leashed. Must not have a level 3 sex offense or arson conviction. Hours: 7 days per week 6pm-8am Saturday, November 15, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 Intake: 6pm-10:30pm Doors are locked between 10:30pm-5am (541) 962-7994 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER DESCHUTES COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER SEVERE WEATHER DESCHUTES COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER SEVERE WEATHER LINN COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER SEVERE WEATHER LINN COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER SEVERE WEATHER UNION COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER
